compiled_state.title: Exclude session_log from Jira reconcile
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
Ensure `session_log` tickets are never synced to Jira and never surface in bridge
audits.

## Why

Session logs are local, verbose, agent-facing artifacts with no place in a Jira
project. The reconciler currently maps every type to a Jira issue type; we must
exclude `session_log` so reconcile never emits it.

## What

- Add an `EXCLUDED_SYNC_TYPES` set (containing `session_log`) in
  `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/config.py`.
- Filter it in `compute_outbound_mutations()` in
  `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/outbound_differ.py`, alongside the existing
  excluded-status check.
- Deliberately do NOT add `session_log` to `_LOCAL_TO_JIRA_TYPE`, so any leak
  fails loudly rather than syncing silently.
- Confirm `bridge_fsck` is unaffected (session logs are never bound, so they never
  appear in its reports).

## Scope

Outbound reconcile exclusion only. No inbound/bridge schema changes.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] A dry-run `reconcile` over a store containing `session_log` tickets produces
      zero mutations for them.
- [ ] `session_log` is absent from `_LOCAL_TO_JIRA_TYPE`.
- [ ] `bridge_fsck` output contains no `session_log` entries.
- [ ] Tests assert the outbound exclusion with a `session_log` fixture.

comments.body:
COMPLETED. Added EXCLUDED_SYNC_TYPES = frozenset({'session_log'}) to rebar_reconciler/config.py and filtered it in compute_outbound_mutations() (both the absent-GET pre-selection loop and the main mutation loop), alongside the existing excluded-status check. Used a lazy _load_config() sibling-loader mirroring the existing _load_adf/_load_comment_limits pattern (outbound_differ may be imported via spec_from_file_location without package context).

session_log deliberately remains ABSENT from _LOCAL_TO_JIRA_TYPE (leak-loud invariant). Confirmed bridge_fsck shows no session_log entries (logs are never bound).

Tests: tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/diffing/test_outbound_differ_session_log_exclusion.py — session_log in EXCLUDED_SYNC_TYPES; absent from _LOCAL_TO_JIRA_TYPE; unbound session_log yields zero mutations while a sibling task still CREATEs (surgical); bound session_log also yields zero. Full offline tier: 2065 passed, 0 failed. ruff clean.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
